title: Egg Salad
description: Classic creamy egg salad with Dijon mustard and a hint of lemon. Great on soft bread or as a side.

steps.instruction: Place eggs in a saucepan and cover with cold water by 1 inch. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
Once boiling, reduce heat to medium. Cook exactly 10–11 minutes for fully set eggs.
Transfer immediately to an ice water bath. Peel once cool enough to handle.
Chop peeled eggs into irregular pieces approximately 8–12 mm. No piece should exceed 15 mm.
In a bowl, combine mayonnaise, mustard, lemon juice, and seasonings. Mix well.
Fold chopped eggs into the mayo mixture. Stir until every piece is coated.
Taste and adjust seasoning. Add more mayo if the mixture seems dry. Serve immediately or refrigerate.

notes: The ice bath immediately after cooking stops carry-over cooking and prevents rubbery egg whites. Don't skip it!
